MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Vanguard Properties, Inc., A California Demurrer To Amended Complaint is off calendar. Duplicate entry for tentative ruling purposes only. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend.

1st Cause of Action: Plaintiff fails to show that a fiduciary relationship existed between Vanguard and Plaintiff. Plaintiff fails to show that Vanguard was P's real estate broker or that an ostensible agency existed. The terms of the TIC Agreement clearly establish that Gallin and Jones, on behalf of GJ Creative, would perform non-real estate licensed activity in connection with the creation of the TIC Interests in exchange for a consulting fee. Moreover, none of the alleged wrongful conduct upon which the cause of action is predicated, (SAC 13), has anything to do with the listing, sale, leasing, exchange of or lending on real property, or any other conduct for which a real estate license is required. (Bus. & Prof. Code 10131; 10159.2.) While the TIC Agreement generally provides that Gallin and Jones were to "coordinate efforts to market and sell the TIC Interests," they were not contracted or authorized to list or sell the TIC Interests under the TIC Agreement. Plaintiff's allegations that Gallin and Jones were contracted to "solicit prospective buyers, list the TIC Interests for sale, and negotiate the purchase and sale of the TIC Interests," (SAC, 11), is not supported (if not completely undermined) by the terms of the agreement that expressly state that P was free to retain any agent or broker to market and sell the TIC interests once they were created. (Id. at Ex. B, 3(B).) (part 1 of 4). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer and to allege facts in support of each cause of action as to the moving defendant. Specifically (but not limited to) factual allegations shall connect the alleged wrongdoings by Gallin and Jones with any actives of real estate agents and brokers giving rise to fiduciary duties/contractual obligations of real estate agents/brokers, etc.. (Allegations in paragraph 12 of the Frist Amended Complaint fail to do so).

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
